title: Review: bridge-zephyr 2026-06-26
notes:
Review confidence: 25% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: Zephyr net_pkt lifecycle (ownership semantics), k_thread/k_mutex edge cases, LoRa driver timing constraints.
Would raise confidence if: ran with ASan/UBSan under load, traced packet ownership through actual TX/RX cycles.
